item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hey, so this might be kind of weird but I'm your new SCP neighbor (over at 5911). That led me to your SCP and this was great! I'm a big Fargo/Coen fan so this was an awesome treat to stumble on. I feel like you really grabbed on to that magical realism that Fargo invokes, and it made for a very fun read.

I also thought it was funny because I wrote 5911 to be a movie-centric article, and chose the number before I read yours. I think it's kinda cool to have two movie SCPs back to back at random like that.

Anyway, just wanted to tell you that I liked your SCP a lot and this is a definite +1 for me!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
An SCP based on Fargo, eh? Well, I'm not going to upvote it if it doesn't include—

You betcha.

+1.

item.title: Or is it?
item.content:encoded:
A scip tribute to one of my favourite movies! I loved the idea of people who think that Fargo is real, so I decided to explore that in a midwestern murder story of my own.
I've tried to make this palatable for readers who aren't familiar with the film, and with a few little nods for the readers who are.

Quite a few people read this one, including Cerastes and OCuin. Thanks to everyone who gave their feedback!

This image is borrowed from:

Original Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Route_52_Snow_Storm_Midwest_(24258744379).jpg
Creator: Tony Webster
